_doc: [Auth 2] Email-domain → company mapping. When a Google SSO login arrives, the user's email domain is looked up here to decide which tenant they belong to. Per BUILD_INDEX default #2, an unmatched domain routes to the no-company admin approval queue rather than auto-creating a tenant.

_format.domain: the lowercase part after the @ in the email
_format.company_id: must match a row in companies.json
_format.auto_provision: if true, create the User row on first login; if false, hold in admin queue
